description: Create a custom correlation rule in Wazuh to detect 'ephemeral' accounts (users created and then deleted shortly after). In `local_rules.xml`, implement rule ID 100050 with severity Level 12. The rule must trigger when a User Deletion event (SID 5904) occurs within 300 seconds of a User Creation event (SID 5902) for the same user. Apply the changes to the Wazuh Manager and verify the rule is active.
